{

  "subject": "RE: Hold release on PO-LH-Q3-3014 – overdue invoices fully settled, please release",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,

Thanks for the update.

For customer PO PO-LH-Q3-3014, we located the corresponding Salesforce Order 00000138 (current status: Draft). The credit hold was due to overdue invoices INV-KS-2026-05-7102 and INV-KS-2026-05-7118.

We have the payment reference WIRE-LH-2026-06-2104 (value date 2026-06-12) settling USD 21,485 against INV-KS-2026-05-7102 and INV-KS-2026-05-7118. We are now proceeding with the hold release; it is currently pending final one-click approval in our system.

Once the release is confirmed, we will notify you and the order can move forward for processing/shipment.

Reference: Case 00001521.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
